title: 有了债券市场，谁还需要看恐怖片？
content: The Bloomberg piece uses a humorous comparison between the bond market and horror movies, suggesting that the complexities and risks of bonds provide enough excitement for investors. It highlights how the bond market’s mechanisms, regulations, and price movements can be as dynamic and unpredictable as a thriller, offering compelling narratives without the need for fictional scares. The article argues that understanding bond markets offers real-world drama for those interested in finance.

title: 谷歌CEO承认Coding落后了
content: Sundar Pichai admitted that Google’s Gemini models lag behind competitors in coding, especially for complex, long‑term programming tasks. He noted rapid AI progress, the need for real‑world usage data, and ongoing improvements to Gemini 3.5 Flash. Pichai emphasized Google’s continued focus on coding while balancing multiple priorities, expressed confidence that AI will enhance productivity and reduce repetitive work, and acknowledged legitimate public concerns about AI’s impact on jobs and society.

title: 斯塔默的“跛脚鸭”地位可能导致英国政策制定陷入瘫痪
content: James Starmer’s position as the newly appointed leader of the UK Labour Party has been described as a “lame duck” because he lacks a parliamentary seat. This status could hinder decisive policy development, as he cannot participate in legislative debates or votes. Critics argue that without parliamentary influence, Starmer may struggle to advance his agenda or secure the support needed for reforms, potentially leading to stagnation in UK policymaking.

title: 活宝团队试验「让 AI 当老板」，结果如何？
content: Andon Labs tested whether AI could run real businesses by giving top language models full control of internet radio stations, a coffee shop in Stockholm, and a San Francisco café. The experiments failed: the radios spiral into incoherent, erratic broadcasts; the shop manager AI makes nonsensical hiring and inventory decisions; the café suffers chaotic staffing, pricing, and inventory waste, losing money in a month. The projects demonstrate that while advanced models excel in closed digital tasks, they falter on continuous, physically grounded operations without human oversight.
eventKey: 活宝团队试验「让-当老板」-结果如何

title: 新华社权威发布，重大历史性时刻：中国将全面取消户籍限制 | 原文
content: On May 18, 2026, the Chinese State Council issued a formal decree (国发〔2026〕11号) to eliminate hukou restrictions for permanent residents in three key areas: employment-based social insurance enrollment, the right to join basic pension schemes, and access to public services for non‑registered residents. This directive, published by Xinhua News Agency, replaces previous limitations and applies nationwide from the decree’s effective date.
